induction_input: The report the manager reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked vanished.
The letter the student wrote disappeared.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the artist recorded charted.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences with a double subject-verb structure where a noun is modified by a relative clause (without a relative pronoun) before taking its own intransitive verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences with a double subject-verb structure where a noun is modified by a relative clause (without a relative pronoun) before taking its own intransitive verb.
l2_sentences: The dog chased by the cat trembled.
The book left on the shelf disappeared.
The child ignored by the teacher wept.
The car abandoned in the lot rusted.
The man hired last week resigned.
l1_sentences: The report the manager reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked vanished.
The letter the student wrote disappeared.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the artist recorded charted.
